title: hedeoma ciliolata
intro: Hedeoma ciliolata, also known as woodland pennyroyal, is a perennial herb that belongs to the mint family and is native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of woodland pennyroyal include relief from digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce fever and soothe skin irritations. Woodland pennyroyal can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, making it a versatile plant for natural health remedies.
